auth.label: API Token
auth.description: StatusCake API token used with the Authorization Bearer header. View or manage it from the StatusCake account panel.

actions.name: create_uptime_test
actions.description: Create a new StatusCake uptime test.

host.description: The hosting provider name recorded for the uptime test.

name.description: The human-readable name of the uptime test.

port.description: The destination port used for TCP uptime tests.

tags.description: Tags assigned to the uptime test.

paused.description: Whether the uptime test should be paused.

dns_ips.description: The DNS IP addresses expected from the monitored host.

regions.description: The regions used for the uptime test.

timeout.description: The timeout in seconds before StatusCake marks the probe as failed.

use_jar.description: Whether the uptime test stores cookies between requests.

post_raw.description: The raw HTTP request body sent by StatusCake for POST-based uptime tests.

post_body.description: A JSON string payload sent by StatusCake when the uptime test uses POST.

test_type.description: The uptime test type accepted by StatusCake.

check_rate.description: The uptime check interval in seconds accepted by StatusCake.

dns_server.description: The FQDN or IP address of the DNS server used for DNS uptime tests.

user_agent.description: The custom user agent string sent by StatusCake when probing the target.

do_not_find.description: Whether StatusCake should fail the test when the find_string is present.

find_string.description: The string that must be present in the response body for the uptime test to pass.

website_url.description: The URL or IP address of the server monitored by the uptime test.

confirmation.description: The number of confirmation servers StatusCake uses before alerting.

trigger_rate.description: The number of minutes StatusCake waits before sending an alert.

anyOf.description: A JSON string representing the custom headers sent by StatusCake.

additionalProperties.description: A custom header value sent to the monitored server.

anyOf.description: A string-to-string object representing custom headers.

custom_header.description: A JSON string or object representing the custom headers sent by StatusCake.

basic_password.description: The basic authentication password used by the uptime test.

basic_username.description: The basic authentication username used by the uptime test.

contact_groups.description: The contact group IDs notified by the uptime test.

follow_redirects.description: Whether StatusCake should follow redirects while probing the target.

include_header.description: Whether response headers should be included when matching the response body.

anyOf.description: An HTTP status code accepted by StatusCake.
An HTTP status code accepted by StatusCake.

items.description: An HTTP status code accepted by StatusCake for uptime validation.

status_codes.description: The HTTP status codes considered healthy by the uptime test.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for creating a StatusCake uptime test.

id.description: The unique identifier of the uptime test.

name.description: The human-readable name of the uptime test.

test_type.description: The uptime test type returned by StatusCake.

website_url.description: The URL or IP address monitored by the uptime test.

status.description: The current status of the uptime test.

uptime.description: The uptime percentage reported by StatusCake.

test.description: A StatusCake uptime test returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: The newly created StatusCake uptime test.

test_id.description: The unique identifier of the StatusCake uptime test.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for targeting a single StatusCake uptime test.

deleted.description: Whether the uptime test was deleted successfully.

outputSchema.description: The deletion acknowledgement returned by the StatusCake provider.

actions.name: get_uptime_test
actions.description: Get the full configuration and status of a single StatusCake uptime test.

test_id.description: The unique identifier of the StatusCake uptime test.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for targeting a single StatusCake uptime test.

id.description: The unique identifier of the uptime test.

name.description: The human-readable name of the uptime test.

test_type.description: The uptime test type returned by StatusCake.

website_url.description: The URL or IP address monitored by the uptime test.

status.description: The current status of the uptime test.

uptime.description: The uptime percentage reported by StatusCake.

test.description: A StatusCake uptime test returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: The StatusCake uptime test lookup result.

actions.name: list_uptime_locations
actions.description: List available monitoring locations for StatusCake uptime tests.

inputSchema.description: No input parameters are required for this action.

country.description: The country name of the uptime location.

city.description: The city name of the uptime location.

ipv4.description: The IPv4 address of the uptime location.

ipv6.description: The IPv6 address of the uptime location.

locations.description: The uptime monitoring locations returned by StatusCake.

outputSchema.description: The monitoring locations returned by StatusCake.

actions.name: list_uptime_test_alerts
actions.description: List alerts triggered for a StatusCake uptime test.

test_id.description: The unique identifier of the StatusCake uptime test.

limit.description: The maximum number of records to return per page.

before.description: Only return records before this UNIX timestamp.

after.description: Only return records after this UNIX timestamp.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing a paginated StatusCake test sub-resource.

id.description: The unique identifier of the uptime alert.

status.description: The uptime status that triggered the alert.

status_code.description: The HTTP status code recorded for the alert.

triggered_at.description: An ISO 8601 timestamp returned by the StatusCake API.

items.description: An uptime alert returned by StatusCake.

alerts.description: The uptime alerts returned by StatusCake.

self.description: The URL of the current page.

next.description: The URL of the next page, when available.

outputSchema.description: The uptime alert list returned by StatusCake.

actions.name: list_uptime_test_history
actions.description: List historical probe results for a StatusCake uptime test.

test_id.description: The unique identifier of the StatusCake uptime test.

limit.description: The maximum number of records to return per page.

before.description: Only return records before this UNIX timestamp.

after.description: Only return records after this UNIX timestamp.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing a paginated StatusCake test sub-resource.

location.description: The location code where the uptime check was executed.

created_at.description: An ISO 8601 timestamp returned by the StatusCake API.

status_code.description: The HTTP status code returned by the probe.

items.description: A historical uptime result returned by StatusCake.

history.description: The historical uptime probe results returned by StatusCake.

self.description: The URL of the current page.

next.description: The URL of the next page, when available.

outputSchema.description: The uptime history returned by StatusCake.

actions.name: list_uptime_test_periods
actions.description: List uptime or downtime periods recorded for a StatusCake uptime test.

test_id.description: The unique identifier of the StatusCake uptime test.

limit.description: The maximum number of records to return per page.

before.description: Only return records before this UNIX timestamp.

after.description: Only return records after this UNIX timestamp.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing a paginated StatusCake test sub-resource.

status.description: The status recorded for the period.

created_at.description: An ISO 8601 timestamp returned by the StatusCake API.

ended_at.description: An ISO 8601 timestamp returned by the StatusCake API.

duration.description: The duration of the period in milliseconds.

items.description: A downtime or uptime period returned by StatusCake.

periods.description: The uptime or downtime periods returned by StatusCake.

self.description: The URL of the current page.

next.description: The URL of the next page, when available.

outputSchema.description: The uptime period list returned by StatusCake.

actions.name: list_uptime_tests
actions.description: List uptime tests available in the connected StatusCake account.

page.description: The page number of results to return.

limit.description: The number of uptime tests to return per page.

tags.description: A comma-separated list of tags used to filter uptime tests.

uptime.description: Whether the response should include uptime data.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing StatusCake uptime tests.

id.description: The unique identifier of the uptime test.

name.description: The human-readable name of the uptime test.

test_type.description: The uptime test type returned by StatusCake.

website_url.description: The URL or IP address monitored by the uptime test.

status.description: The current status of the uptime test.

uptime.description: The uptime percentage reported by StatusCake.

items.description: A StatusCake uptime test returned by the API.

tests.description: The uptime tests returned by StatusCake.

per_page.description: The number of items returned per page.

total_count.description: The total number of matching items.

outputSchema.description: The uptime test list returned by StatusCake.
